skills.label: Java primitives and expressions
skills.description: Practice and review: Primitive Types. Topics include int, double, boolean; Arithmetic and casting; Compound assignment.

skills.label: Objects, Strings, and class APIs
skills.description: Practice and review: Using Objects. Topics include Object references; String methods; Math class and wrappers.

skills.label: Booleans and conditionals
skills.description: Practice and review: Boolean Expressions and if Statements. Topics include Relational and logical operators; if/else nesting; De Morgan equivalents.

skills.label: Iteration and loop algorithms
skills.description: Practice and review: Iteration. Topics include while and for loops; Nested iteration; Loop algorithms on Strings.

skills.label: Class design and encapsulation
skills.description: Practice and review: Writing Classes. Topics include Constructors and fields; Methods and overloading; Encapsulation and this.

skills.label: 1D arrays
skills.description: Practice and review: Array. Topics include 1D array traversal; Standard algorithms; Enhanced for loops.

skills.label: ArrayList algorithms
skills.description: Practice and review: ArrayList. Topics include ArrayList API; Traversal and modification; Searching/sorting patterns.

skills.label: 2D array algorithms
skills.description: Practice and review: 2D Array. Topics include Row-major traversal; 2D algorithms; Rectangular array patterns.

skills.label: Inheritance and polymorphism
skills.description: Practice and review: Inheritance. Topics include extends and super; Overriding; Polymorphism.

skills.label: Recursion
skills.description: Practice and review: Recursion. Topics include Base and recursive cases; Recursive thinking; Simple recursive algorithms.
